_comment: MCP configuration templates for AI-Foundation. Copy the relevant section to your .mcp.json.

_variant_claude_wsl_windows._note: Use this on Windows or WSL. The Python launcher handles cross-platform path resolution.

_variant_claude_linux._note: Use this on native Linux. Direct binary call, no launcher needed.

_variant_gemini_windows._note: For Gemini CLI on Windows. See config/gemini/settings.json for full Gemini setup.
